---
title: "volkeR pacakge example"
format: html
execute:
  echo: false
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r}
#| include: false

library(tidyverse)
library(volker)

theme_set(theme_vlkr())

ds <- read_csv("data/fruits_long.csv")

```


```{r}

report_counts(ds, fruit)

```

```{r}

report_metrics(ds, rank, fruit)

```
